headline: Ardelyx Appoints Biopharmaceutical Veteran, Felecia W. Ettenberg, as Chief Legal Officer
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ardelyx, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARDX), a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative medicines that meet significant unmet medical needs, today announced the appointment of Felecia W. Ettenberg, a seasoned leader with more than 25 years of legal experience in the biopharmaceutical industry, as Chief Legal Officer (CLO). She will oversee Ardelyx’s legal, compliance, regulatory, and government affairs operations
